info.title: Document Report Generator
info.description: Generates a professional DOCX report and returns a download URL.

servers.description: Replace with your API Gateway hostname from: terraform output api_gateway_url

post.summary: Generate a DOCX report and return the download URL
post.description: Generates a professional DOCX report based on the given title and query. Returns the download URL. IMPORTANT: Always pass the knowledge base search results from the RAG tool as the context parameter so the report contains accurate data.

context.description: The RAG search results to use as report data. Always pass the knowledge base results here.

url.description: Download URL for the DOCX report
